executive_answer: Pepino contamination was created BEFORE human review on the Pepino line — during first Bidfood extract on 2026-06-09, via automatic post-insert cost sync.

rationale: Pack Variants (P1) splits formats at catalog level but does NOT stop extract auto-sync writing poisoned history to shared ingredient_id before review
Pepino contamination persisted without alias and without user click — workflow gate is the first irreversible-write control point
Matching improvements alone are insufficient while syncOperationalIngredientCostsFromInvoiceLines writes on confirmed+exact without confirm
minimum_workflow_fixes: Gate extract cost sync to user-confirmed matches only (or suggested → pending)
Add Remove match + price_history cleanup for wrong confirmed matches
Remediate existing a689bd91 poison row for VL Pepino conserva

items: Remove match / No match UI + history cleanup
Demote high-risk exact matches to suggested pending confirm
next_work_ranking.blocks: All trustworthy costing on multi-format catalogs

items: Block exact promotion on preservation_class mismatch (fresh vs conserva)
Token-subset guard for catalog names with modifier tokens (conserva, seco, etc.)
next_work_ranking.blocks: Recurrence even after workflow gate if matcher still suggests wrong link
Production-grade multi-format €/line after workflow+matcher prevent wrong links

pack_variants_without_workflow_fix.reason: Wrong-format lines can still auto-persist cost to parent ingredient_id on extract before variant resolution exists
